title: Polysomnography Harmonization Schemes: A Multi-Institutional Sleep Research Resource
description: This repository contains the proposed schemas and example files for polysomnography data harmonization. The schemas organize heterogeneous biosignals, derived sleep parameters, and demographic features to support harmonization across datasets.
